headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics misses quarterly revenue estimates by 8%

sentiment.reasoning: Missing revenue estimates by 8% indicates a clear negative performance gap that typically triggers immediate downward price pressure.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
